title: AGP v1 — Common Primitives
description: Reusable type definitions shared by every AGP v1 schema. Imported via $ref by record/family/snapshot/bundle schemas. Locked by docs/agp/agp-canonical-bundle-and-emitter-mvp-spec.md.

AgpVersion.title: AGP protocol version
AgpVersion.description: SemVer for the AGP wire contract. Locked at 1.0.0 in v1 schemas.

SemverString.title: SemVer string
SemverString.description: Plain semver — pre-release / build-metadata permitted but not required.

RecordSchemaVersion.title: Per-record schemaVersion
RecordSchemaVersion.description: The schema version of the AGP record envelope. v1 locks 'agp.record.v1'.

SnapshotSchemaVersion.title: Snapshot schemaVersion
SnapshotSchemaVersion.description: The schema version of snapshot.json. v1 locks 'agp.snapshot.v1'.

SnapshotFamily.title: Snapshot manifest family marker
SnapshotFamily.description: The snapshot record family is reserved for snapshot.json itself; it does NOT appear in records.ndjson.

Plane.title: Three-plane separation tag
Plane.description: factual = in snapshotDigest; evidence = non-authoritative; trust = provenance/attestation.

HashAlgorithmPrefix.title: Declarative hash algorithm prefix
HashAlgorithmPrefix.description: AGP v1 supports BLAKE3 for internal payloadHash (`b3:`) and SHA-256 for public subject digests (`sha256:`). Unknown prefixes are rejected.

Blake3Digest.title: BLAKE3 digest
Blake3Digest.description: Lowercase hex BLAKE3 digest prefixed with `b3:`. 64 hex chars = 256 bits.

Sha256Digest.title: SHA-256 digest
Sha256Digest.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 digest prefixed with `sha256:`. 64 hex chars.

PayloadHash.title: Per-record payload hash
PayloadHash.description: AGP v1 record payloadHash MUST be a BLAKE3 digest.

SnapshotDigest.title: Public snapshot digest
SnapshotDigest.description: AGP v1 snapshotDigest MUST be a SHA-256 digest for OCI/SLSA/in-toto/Sigstore compatibility.

InputDigest.title: Provenance input digest
InputDigest.description: SHA-256 digest over the source Arch-Engine JSON v2 bytes.

GraphSurfaceHash.title: Arch-Engine canonical-topology graphSurfaceHash
GraphSurfaceHash.description: Verbatim from JSON v2 data.topology.canonical.graphSurfaceHash. Non-authoritative in AGP — informational only.

RecordId.title: AGP record identity
RecordId.description: Canonical formula: `agp:<family>:<kind>:b3:<64-hex>`. Verifier MUST recompute and compare.

PosixRelativePath.title: Repo-relative POSIX path
PosixRelativePath.description: Forward slashes only. Never absolute. Never starts with `/`, `\`, or a Windows drive letter. `..` traversal forbidden.

ObservationConfidence.title: Observation confidence (numeric)
ObservationConfidence.description: Float in [0, 1]. Used by observation records only.

AdapterName.title: Adapter package name
AdapterName.description: npm-style scoped package name for the adapter that produced the evidence.

SourceCommand.title: Arch-Engine command that produced the JSON v2 envelope

Timestamp.title: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp
Timestamp.description: Second precision. Allowed only in snapshot.payload.emittedAt, observation.payload.createdAt, and provenance.payload.producedAt. EXCLUDED from factual snapshotDigest.

RedactionPolicy.title: Provenance redaction policy declaration
RedactionPolicy.description: Every bundle declares how it handled host-specific data.

ShapeHash.title: Optional graph-shape hash
ShapeHash.description: Versioned algorithm + value. Non-authoritative — informational only.

NodeLinkerSource.title: Provenance tag for nodeLinker (v1.3.1+ trust polish)

description: This document declares reusable $defs only and does not validate concrete bundles directly. It is referenced via $ref by every other v1 schema.
